_setup_instructions.step1: Replace GOOGLE-SHEET-URL with your Google Sheet URL
_setup_instructions.step2: Replace YOUR-ID with any random UUID
_setup_instructions.step3: Replace AUTH-ID with your n8n Google Sheets credential ID
_setup_instructions.step4: Import into n8n via: Workflows > Import from File
_setup_instructions.step5: Set up Cloudflare tunnel and paste URL into VAPI Server URL
